pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent POM version to align with the target Java 21 environment.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21; the build will fail or produce incompatible artifacts without upgrading to Spring Boot 3.x.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The compiler and runtime configuration must target Java 21 to utilize new language features and ensure compatibility with the upgraded framework.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot Maven plugin version to match the new parent POM.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old plugin version is incompatible with the new Spring Boot parent and Java 21, causing build failures.
